response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned engineer (10+ years) with strong full-stack and systems experience, but the role explicitly requires C++ as the primary language with deep STL, multi-threading, and industrial automation experience. The resume shows only a brief 6-month C/C++ stint at National Instruments back in 2014–2015, with the bulk of recent work in TypeScript/Node.js/DLang. No evidence of IEC 62443, MQTT, industrial protocols, or message-broker-based C++ systems. Skills section omits C++ entirely.
strengths: 10+ years of polyglot engineering experience with architectural breadth
Strong testing/TDD discipline and mentoring/teaching track record
Some embedded and low-latency systems exposure (DLang microservices, robotics)
concerns: Negligible recent C++ experience; C++ not even listed in skills
No industrial automation, IEC 62443, or MQTT/Modbus/OPC UA background
Career trajectory is web/cloud full-stack, not on-prem industrial platforms

key_factors.factor: Missing industrial cybersecurity (IEC 62443) and protocol experience
Strong general engineering seniority and architecture exposure
